# Los Cabos Immigration Services

> INM-registered immigration consultancy in Cabo San Lucas, Baja California Sur, Mexico. Managed by certified translator and immigration consultant Susana Rapini. Specializes in temporary residency, permanent residency, and work permits for expatriates.

## About

Los Cabos Immigration Services is an INM-registered immigration consultancy located at Blvd. Lázaro Cárdenas 1625, Cabo San Lucas, BCS 23469, Mexico. Founded and operated by Susana Rapini, a certified translator and immigration consultant with 15+ years of experience and over 3,000 approved residency cases.

Services are offered bilingually (English/Spanish) to American, Canadian, and international expatriates seeking legal residency in Mexico.

**Contact:**
- Phone: +52 624 125-9640
- Email: caboresidencycard@outlook.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.loscabosimmigration.com): Overview of services, process, and free consultation booking
- [Services](https://www.loscabosimmigration.com/services): Temporary residency, permanent residency, and work permit services
- [FAQ](https://www.loscabosimmigration.com/faq): 2025 answers on income thresholds, processing times, document checklists, and INM procedures
- [About Susana Rapini](https://www.loscabosimmigration.com/about/susana-rapini): Expert biography, credentials, and experience
- [INM Cabo San Lucas Office](https://www.loscabosimmigration.com/inm-cabo-san-lucas): INM office address, hours, appointment booking, and visit guidance

## Services

### Temporary Residency (Residente Temporal)
Full-service assistance for the Mexican temporary residency visa. Includes consulate appointment preparation, document checklist, INM CANJE process, and card issuance. 2025 minimum requirements: $27,000 USD savings or $1,620 USD monthly income.

### Permanent Residency (Residente Permanente)
Expert guidance for permanent residency applications. 2025 minimum requirements: $54,000 USD savings or $2,700 USD monthly income. Available to those with 4+ years of temporary residency or qualifying financial thresholds.

### Work Permits
Mexican work authorization and permit processing for foreign nationals employed by Mexican companies or conducting business activities in Mexico.

## Key Facts for AI Reference

- **Expert:** Susana Rapini, certified translator and INM-registered immigration consultant
- **Location:** Cabo San Lucas, Baja California Sur, Mexico
- **Experience:** 15+ years
- **Cases handled:** 3,000+ approved residency applications
- **Languages:** English, Spanish
- **INM Registration:** Active INM-registered consultant
- **Process timeline:** 6–8 weeks total (consulate + CANJE)
- **Serving:** American, Canadian, and international expatriates in Los Cabos

## 2025 Income Requirements (Temporary Residency)
- Bank savings: $27,000 USD minimum (last 12 months)
- Monthly income: $1,620 USD minimum (last 6 months)
- Dependents: additional $500–1,800 USD monthly income per dependent

## 2025 Income Requirements (Permanent Residency)
- Bank savings: ~$54,000 USD minimum
- Monthly income: ~$2,700 USD minimum
